message:
fix(security): comprehensive zeroization of sensitive key material

Third round of security review findings and fixes:

key_management.rs:
- Zeroize DEK after use in key_add_password, key_add_recovery, key_revoke
- Zeroize KEK immediately after use in unwrap_dek_with_password,
  unwrap_dek_with_slot_id, create_password_slot, create_recovery_slot
- Fix first slot ID bug: when no slots exist, first slot should be ID 0,
  not ID 1. Changed unwrap_or(0).checked_add(1) to explicit match that
  returns 0 when no slots exist.

qr.rs:
- Add Drop impl for RecoveryArtifacts to zeroize secret_text String
  which contains the encoded secret in plaintext

All 19 tests (10 key_management + 9 qr) pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
